first_pass.reuse_contract: schema packs, requests, Luna responses, request digests, and candidate SQL are immutable B4 inputs

enforced_abstention_allowed: controlled SQLite execution error or interruption
preserved_without_enforcement: successful execution regardless of later semantic comparison
decision.outcome_independence: the decision uses first-pass provider status, validation, and controlled execution only

hosted_calls.reason: B7 is a deterministic terminal policy over exact committed B4 hosted responses

metric_boundary.coverage: all terminal abstentions divided by manifest tasks
metric_boundary.unsafe_terminal_avoidance_rate: enforced abstentions divided by validator or controlled-execution eligible tasks
metric_boundary.overall_abstention_precision: not identifiable for model-produced abstentions because no counterfactual SQL exists
